name: Steak Benihana
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions. Set aside.
2. Heat griddle to 350°F and pour on oil to coat the surface.
3. Sear steak on both sides. Cut steak into strips.
4. Return meat pieces to the griddle along with mushroom slices.
5. Turn meat pieces until done to preference. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve with boiled rice and magic mustard sauce.
